calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Oct-16-2024 Off Calendar

PETITION Petition For Administration Of The Estate Of A Missing Person
Off Calendar Oct-23-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Tracy Potts, Esq., for Emrich International Probate Research, Inc., Petitioner.

At the court's query, counsel confirms that the sole potential asset of this estate is the inheritance portion of the mother's estate and that no additional heirs have been located. The court then confirms that the presumed date of death is Dec-31-2006. The court confirms that it will be taking the Petition for Letters of Administration off calendar and taking the Petition for Administration of the Estate of a Missing Person under submission. No objection to the preceding is presented.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Lopez. Not Reported.

PETITION Petition For Administration Of The Estate Of A Missing Person
Off Calendar Oct-02-2024 Continued To Oct-16-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Sep-04-2024 Continued To Oct-16-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
